title: VACATION FOR EID-UL-ADHA 2026
body:
This is for information and necessary action of all concerned that on the occasions of Eid-ul-Adha, all academic and official activities of Shanto-Mariam University of Creative Technology will remain closed from 25 May 2026 to 01 June 2026.

Electrical and civil maintenance section will remain open on roster basis and all security staff will remain on duty during the aforesaid holidays.

The University will re-open and classes will resume on 02 June 2026 (as per class and duty schedule).

This notice is issued as per directive of the Hon'ble Vice Chancellor.
copyTo: Secretary to BoT (for kind information of Hon'ble Chairman, BoT)
PS to Hon'ble Vice Chancellor (for kind information of Hon'ble Vice Chancellor)
